info.title: Techno Terminal API
info.description: RESTful backend for the Techno Terminal CRM & Operations System

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Search by name or phone (min 2 chars). Empty → all students.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Search by name or phone (min 2 chars). Empty → all students.

get.summary: Get all parents linked to a student

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Search by name or phone (min 2 chars). Empty → all parents.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Search by name or phone (min 2 chars). Empty → all parents.

get.summary: List sessions for a group (optionally filter by level)

parameters.name: level

schema.description: Filter to a specific level number
schema.title: Level

parameters.description: Filter to a specific level number

post.summary: Add an extra session to a group
Progress group to the next level

patch.summary: Update a session (date, time, status, notes)

get.summary: Get session roster with attendance status
get.description: Returns all enrolled students for this session with their current attendance status.

post.summary: Mark / update attendance for a session
post.description: Bulk upsert attendance for a session. Pass a dict of student_id → status. Students not in the dict are left unchanged (not set to absent).

post.summary: Enroll a student in a group
Transfer a student to a new group

get.description: Returns pending competition fees for a student to be paid via Financial Desk setup.

post.description: Returns lines that would create/increase credit before creating a receipt.

get.description: Generate a branded PDF receipt with optional logo and signatures.

post.summary: Add a category to a competition
Register a team for a competition

get.summary: List teams in a competition category

post.summary: Mark competition fee as paid (bypass Finance Desk)

get.description: Returns a list of all employees. Restricted to admin.

post.description: Creates a new employee record. Restricted to admin.

get.description: Returns a single employee by ID. Restricted to admin.

put.description: Updates an existing employee record. Restricted to admin.

get.description: Returns all staff accounts with linked employee info. Restricted to admin.

post.description:
Placeholder endpoint for HR Attendance Logging.
In production, this would persist to attendance records.

get.description: Provides a quick top-level aggregate of the system state.
Returns students attending sessions today who have unpaid balances.
Returns roster for a specific group and level.
Returns attendance heatmap (student x date matrix) for a group.
Returns daily revenue totals within the specified date range.

get.summary: Get revenue breakdown by payment method
get.description: Returns revenue totals grouped by payment method within the date range.
Returns outstanding balance totals grouped by academic group.
Returns students with highest outstanding balances.
Returns participation and fee summary for all competitions.
Returns daily new enrollment counts over time.

parameters.name: cutoff

schema.description: Start date for trend (default: 90 days ago)
schema.title: Cutoff

parameters.description: Start date for trend (default: 90 days ago)

get.description: Returns enrollment retention/dropout rates per course.
Returns group/student counts per instructor.
Returns student counts per course/level showing progression funnel.
Returns revenue and attendance correlation per instructor.
Returns schedule slot utilization percentages.
Returns students likely to drop out based on attendance/debt patterns.

CoursePublic.title: CoursePublic
CoursePublic.description: Full course profile — safe for API consumers.

DashboardSummaryPublic.title: DashboardSummaryPublic
DashboardSummaryPublic.description: High-level dashboard aggregates for admin view.

EmployeeCreateInput.title: EmployeeCreateInput
EmployeeCreateInput.description:
Input for creating/updating an employee via API.
Includes all fields needed for HR operations.

EmployeePublic.title: EmployeePublic
EmployeePublic.description:
Safe employee view for API consumers.
Excludes: monthly_salary, contract_percentage, national_id (sensitive)

EnrollStudentInput.title: EnrollStudentInput
EnrollStudentInput.description: Input DTO for enrolling a student.

EnrollmentPublic.title: EnrollmentPublic
EnrollmentPublic.description:
Public enrollment profile returned by the API.
Masks internals like `created_by` or raw metadata.

FinancialSummaryPublic.title: FinancialSummaryPublic
FinancialSummaryPublic.description: Financial summary per enrollment returned from v_enrollment_balance.

GroupListItem.title: GroupListItem
GroupListItem.description: Slim group for list endpoints — includes denormalized names for display.

GroupPublic.title: GroupPublic
GroupPublic.description: Full group profile returned by GET /academics/groups/{id}.

MarkAttendanceRequest.title: MarkAttendanceRequest
MarkAttendanceRequest.description:
Body for POST /attendance/session/{session_id}/mark.
student_statuses maps student_id → status string ("present" | "absent" | "late" | "excused").

MarkAttendanceResponseDTO.title: MarkAttendanceResponseDTO
MarkAttendanceResponseDTO.description: Output DTO detailing how many records were affected.

ParentListItem.title: ParentListItem
ParentListItem.description: Slim representation for paginated list responses.

ParentPublic.title: ParentPublic
ParentPublic.description: Full parent profile returned by GET /crm/parents/{id}.

PreviewRiskRequest.title: PreviewRiskRequest
PreviewRiskRequest.description: Request to preview overpayment risk for receipt lines.

ReceiptCreatedPublic.title: ReceiptCreatedPublic
ReceiptCreatedPublic.description: Response returned when a new receipt is created.

ReceiptLineInput.title: ReceiptLineInput
ReceiptLineInput.description: One charge line for create_receipt_with_charge_lines (no receipt_id yet).

RegisterParentInput.title: RegisterParentInput
RegisterParentInput.description:
Input for CRMService.register_parent() and find_or_create_parent().
The phone_primary field is validated and normalised on input.

RegisterStudentCommandDTO.title: RegisterStudentCommandDTO
RegisterStudentCommandDTO.description:
Unified command DTO encompassing the student payload, parent relationship,

and audit context for full CQRS-style registration.

RegisterStudentDTO.title: RegisterStudentDTO
RegisterStudentDTO.description:
Input for CRMService.register_student().

Streamlit date_input returns datetime.date; APIs may send ISO date strings.

SessionAttendanceRowDTO.title: SessionAttendanceRowDTO
SessionAttendanceRowDTO.description: Output DTO for a student's attendance in a single session.

SessionPublic.title: SessionPublic
SessionPublic.description: CourseSession profile returned by session list endpoints.

StaffAccountPublic.title: StaffAccountPublic
StaffAccountPublic.description:
Public view of staff account with linked employee info.
Returned by list_staff_accounts endpoint.

StudentListItem.title: StudentListItem
StudentListItem.description:
Slim representation used in paginated list responses
GET /crm/students — avoids sending unnecessary data on large lists.

StudentPublic.title: StudentPublic
StudentPublic.description:
Full student profile returned by GET /crm/students/{id}.
Safe for external clients — no internal keys, no audit metadata.

TransferStudentInput.title: TransferStudentInput
TransferStudentInput.description: Input DTO for transferring a student.

UnpaidCompFeeItem.title: UnpaidCompFeeItem
UnpaidCompFeeItem.description:
Output DTO for unpaid competition fee records.
Used by Financial Desk to render checkbox payment lines.

UpdateParentDTO.title: UpdateParentDTO
UpdateParentDTO.description:
Input for CRMService.update_parent().
All fields are optional; only provided fields will be written.

UpdateStudentDTO.title: UpdateStudentDTO
UpdateStudentDTO.description:
Input for CRMService.update_student().

All fields are optional; only provided fields will be written.

UserPublic.title: UserPublic
UserPublic.description: API / client-facing user shape (no Supabase linkage id).
